Tushar Lab

Resources

Open-source tools, datasets, and model weights from the lab — freely available to the research community.

🛠 Software

Software

VLST Toolkit

Open-source framework for running virtual lung screening trials using digital human phantoms and CT simulation.

PythonCT SimulationVirtual Trials
GitHub ↗
Software

CPU-Index Evaluation Tool

Python package for computing the Comprehensive CT Protocol Utility Index — a task-based image quality metric.

PythonImage QualityCT Protocol
GitHub ↗

🗄 Dataset

Dataset

SYN-LUNGS Dataset

Synthetically generated lung CT volumes with annotated nodules, spanning diverse patient anatomies and acquisition protocols.

CTLung NodulesSynthetic Data

🤖 Model

Model

DukeSeg Pre-trained Weights

Pre-trained model weights for weakly-supervised organ segmentation on chest and abdomen CT.

PyTorchSegmentationTransfer Learning
GitHub ↗
